title: TPA Xpress
description: Tx turns "/tpa [player]" into a single click—no typing, no mistakes, just dialogs.
body:
**📦 Tx – Lightweight Teleport Assistant**

Still typing out player names manually to send teleport requests?

Tx reimagines the TPA experience: no more memorizing usernames, no more typos, no more spamming TAB to find someone. **Everything is click-based**—teleportation has never been this effortless.

**How it simplifies your workflow:**

1. Press the quick action key after installing the pack (**G** by default)
2. Select “Teleport Request” from the dialog menu
3. A player list pops up, displaying each player’s **avatar and username**—click to send your request instantly

The recipient receives a clean notification with the requester’s name and clear instructions. No need to scroll through chat logs—just click the prompt to accept or decline.  
The entire process is compressed from **“type command → recall ID → type manually → send”** to **“click → click → send”**. Command typing? Eliminated.

**Perfect for:**

- Busy multiplayer servers with lots of online players  
- New or visiting players who don’t know everyone’s ID  
- Anyone who wants teleport requests to feel quick and natural  

**Customization & What’s Next**

You’ll also be able to customize various teleport messages—prompt text, request expiration time, and more. This quick-config feature is still being polished and not yet available in its full form. Stay tuned.

Tx aims to turn the entire teleport experience into **“just click it.”**

---

Tx doesn’t alter how TPA works under the hood—it only streamlines the interaction. Drop-in ready, fully compatible with existing server plugins and vanilla commands. Lightweight. No conflicts.

**From “/tpa whowasthatagain” to a single click.**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
📦 Tx – 轻量级传送助手

你还在手打玩家ID来发送传送请求吗？

Tx 重新设计了 TPA 的交互方式：不再需要记忆玩家名单，不再担心拼写错误，不再反复 TAB 找人。全程点击即可完成，传送从未如此干脆。

它如何简化操作？

安装数据包后，按下快捷操作键（默认为 G）

在弹出的对话框中选择“传送请求”

弹出的玩家列表中清晰显示每位玩家的头像和ID，点击即可发送请求

接收方会收到清晰的提示信息，包含请求者名字和操作指引，无需翻聊天记录，点击提示即可快速同意或拒绝。整个过程从“敲指令→回忆ID→手打→发送”压缩为 “点击→点击→发送” ，彻底省去打指令的麻烦。

适用场景：

多人服务器，在线玩家较多时快速找人

记不住玩家ID的新手或外来玩家

任何想让传送请求更顺手的老玩家

一键设置家（sethome）并命名

移除家（removehome）

点击传送至家中（tphome）

Tx 想把整套传送体验都变成“点一下”。

Tx 不修改原版 TPA 逻辑，只优化操作路径。装上就能用，兼容现有服务器插件和原版命令，轻量无冲突。

把“/tpa 谁谁谁”变成“点一下”。
